name: Nurnberger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix honey, sugar, eggbeater, lemon juice, and rind.
2. Blend in the dry ingredients: flour, cinnamon, and baking soda.
3. Chill the dough overnight.
4. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Roll out small amounts of dough to about 1/4 inch thick.
6. Cut into 2-inch rounds using a cookie cutter.
7. Place each round on a nonstick cookie sheet, leaving space between them.
8. If desired, place a slivered almond in the center of each cookie.
9. Bake until set.
10. Immediately brush with glazing icing.
11. To make the icing: Boil 1 cup sugar and 1/2 cup water until it reaches 230 degrees Fahrenheit (first indication of a thread).
12. Remove from heat and stir in 1/4 cup powdered sugar.
13. Brush lightly over the cookies, reheating slightly with a little water if the icing becomes sugary again.
